rule CDB_Microsoft_Patches_Record_622_Vulnerabili {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Microsoft Patches Record 622 Vulnerabilities, Including Two Exploited Zero-Days"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-07-14"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: SonicWall SMA appliances targeted in zero-day attacks (CVE-2"; content:"CVE-2026-15409"; nocase; sid:1223742; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
